title: Just Enough Portals (JEP)
description: This Mod adds new portals like the Dirt and More!
body:
This Mod Is for More Portals like this!
![The Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f080c4fb9f7cf87cb8008164240799f56ce28d7.png)
I know that looks weird i will update this mod so dont worry and thats all i have for the disc.
Also check the gallery out Maybe it tells you How To make the Portals!

JEP is a Mod for Adding More Portals like the Gravel Portal, Dirt Portal And More! Email Me (go to gallery to Tell you How to make these Portals!)  Email Me At justenoughportals@gmail.com For more Ideas!!!

Dirt Portal Takes You To A Land of Dirt!
Glass Portal Takes you To A Big Land of Glass were you can basiclly allow to xray
Stone Portal Takes you to A stone world were is easy to get Ores!
And Lastly the Gravel Portal Takes you to the world of Gravel So Its Easy to Get Flint!

I hope You Have Fun With This Mod Thank You If you Download, Bye Bye!!!
